CODING.item: * MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE WA_MAT_TEXT wa_lines-tdline INTO WA_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbap INTO wa_vbap
WHERE vbeln = wa_final-vbeln AND posnr = wa_final-posnr.
ls_adrc_ag-STR_SUPPL3 ls_adrc_ag-LOCATION INTO gv_adr SEPARATED BY SPACE.
ls_adrc_we-STR_SUPPL3 ls_adrc_we-LOCATION INTO gv_adr1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO gv_vbak
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbkd INTO gv_vbkd
lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE GV_PO wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_PO SEPARATED BY space.
